sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «مَنْ طَلَبَ الْعُلَا سَهِرَ اللَّيَالِيَ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Ko traži visok položaj, bdijeva noćima».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Whoever seeks greatness stays up through the nights».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ النَّجَاحَ الْكَبِيرَ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى جُهْدٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: To znači da veliki uspjeh zahtijeva veliki napor.
sentences.translationEn: This means that great success requires great effort.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ رِيمٌ تَدْرُسُ كَثِيرًا وَتَنَامُ مُتَأَخِّرًا.
sentences.translation: Rim je mnogo učila i kasno spavala.
sentences.translationEn: Reem studied a lot and slept late.

sentences.arabic: نَالَتْ أَوَّلَ مَرْتَبَةٍ فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ وَفَرِحَ أَهْلُهَا.
sentences.translation: Zauzela je prvo mjesto u školi i njeni roditelji su se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: She got first place in school and her family was happy.
